mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.ear_tag, a.gender, DATE_FORMAT(a.entry_date,'%Y-%m-%d') as entry_date, a.breed, a.batch_id, a.current_pen_id, a.birth_weight, a.status, DATE_FORMAT(a.created_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created_at, b.batch_code, p.pen_name as current_pen_name FROM animals a LEFT JOIN batches b ON a.batch_id = b.id LEFT JOIN pens p ON a.current_pen_id = p.id ORDER BY a.id

SELECT a.id, a.ear_tag, a.gender, DATE_FORMAT(a.entry_date,'%Y-%m-%d') as entry_date, a.breed, a.batch_id, a.current_pen_id, a.birth_weight, a.status, DATE_FORMAT(a.created_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created_at, b.batch_code, p.pen_name as current_pen_name FROM animals a LEFT JOIN batches b ON a.batch_id = b.id LEFT JOIN pens p ON a.current_pen_id = p.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.id, a.ear_tag, a.gender, DATE_FORMAT(a.entry_date,'%Y-%m-%d') as entry_date, a.breed, a.batch_id, a.current_pen_id, a.birth_weight, a.status, DATE_FORMAT(a.created_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created_at, b.batch_code, p.pen_name as current_pen_name FROM animals a LEFT JOIN batches b ON a.batch_id = b.id LEFT JOIN pens p ON a.current_pen_id = p.id WHERE a.ear_tag = #{earTag}

SELECT a.*, b.batch_code, p.pen_name as current_pen_name FROM animals a LEFT JOIN batches b ON a.batch_id = b.id LEFT JOIN pens p ON a.current_pen_id = p.id WHERE a.batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY a.ear_tag
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM animals WHERE ear_tag = #{earTag}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE ear_tag LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO animals (ear_tag, gender, entry_date, breed, batch_id, current_pen_id, birth_weight, status) VALUES (#{earTag}, #{gender}, #{entryDate}, #{breed}, #{batchId}, #{currentPenId}, #{birthWeight}, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.update: UPDATE animals SET current_pen_id = #{penId} WHERE ear_tag = #{earTag}
UPDATE animals SET status = #{status} WHERE ear_tag = #{earTag}
